graph.name: NeoManga_v3_KnowledgeGraph
graph.truth_override: Render.com + 100% Pure Metadata Aggregator (no Cloudinary). Legacy Vercel/Cloudinary references in older commits are SUPERSEDED.

nodes.description: Singleton source registry. Registers masterSource (NeoMangaMasterExtension), meshSource (MeshMangaExtension), and virtualSource (NeoMangaVirtualSource) inside a ConcurrentHashMap<Long, Source>.
HTTP source targeting Olympus Staff via FastAPI backend. Renamed from 'Team X' → 'Olympus Staff' in Release 1 to prevent SQLite source ID collision with MeshMangaExtension.
nodes.hotfix: Chapter URL stored as absolute URL via `url = chapterItem.url` (not setUrlWithoutDomain) to prevent domain routing conflict.

nodes.description: Masquerades as 'Team X' to bypass Mihon core language filters and auto-populate the unified dashboard. Routes to MeshManga via FastAPI.
nodes.masquerade_reason: 'Team X' is hardcoded in GetEnabledSources.kt, GetUnifiedGlobalCatalogUseCase.kt, DashboardScreenModel.kt, MainActivity.kt

nodes.description: Local virtual/offline source. ID 9999L. Registered alongside live sources.
Hardcoded to look for source name 'Team X'. Drives MeshMangaExtension masquerade requirement.
Hardcoded to look for source name 'Team X'. Drives MeshMangaExtension masquerade requirement.
Hardcoded to look for source name 'Team X'. Drives MeshMangaExtension masquerade requirement.
Hardcoded to look for source name 'Team X'. Drives MeshMangaExtension masquerade requirement.
Singleton OkHttpClient factory. Cookie jar, DoH via Cloudflare, disk cache 100 MiB, 30s connect/read timeout, 2min call timeout.
Catches unhandled exceptions in network calls.
Injects custom User-Agent from network preferences.
Exponential backoff on 429; rotates UA on 503.
Launches hidden Android WebView to solve CF JS challenge, extracts cf_clearance cookie, retries request.
Modifies Cache-Control max-age dynamically.
Override in NeoMangaMasterExtension. Extracts host domain from page.imageUrl and sets Referer = scheme://host/ to bypass hotlinking (403 Forbidden). Replaces old Cloudinary proxy flow.
FastAPI application. Defines all endpoints, lifespan event handler (DB init, shared httpx.AsyncClient pool), and APScheduler 60-min sync job.
Scrapes and returns most recently updated manga titles.
Live Pagination with Async Background Ingestion. Returns live-scraped items immediately; upserts to MongoDB via BackgroundTasks. Cache-read-first lookup REMOVED (Release 2 walkthrough fix).
nodes.invariant: No read-first cache; relies on live REST pagination

nodes.description: SWR caching endpoint. Concurrent asyncio.gather scrape of all sources (5.0s timeout per source). Runs Merge-Then-Infer pipeline. Implements slug candidate fallback testing.
nodes.pipeline: fetch → deduplicate raw → infer_chapter_numbers once → sort descending → return

nodes.description: Returns chapter page image URLs. Domain-based dispatch. asyncio.wait_for 5.0s ceiling. Domain rewrite fail-safe. gc.collect() REMOVED (Release 8 P5).
nodes.hotfix: Domain rewrite: meshmanga.com chapter URLs → olympustaff.com before dispatch.

nodes.description: Manual HTTP hook / Vercel Cron trigger for fetch_and_sync_latest_updates().
AsyncIOMotorClient pool. MongoDB collection pointers. extract_chapter_number, infer_chapter_numbers, upsert_manga_entry, check_db_online, create_unique_indexes, generate_slug, slug_mappings loader.
Loads .env via load_dotenv() before Settings class init. Reads MONGO_URI, etc.
AsyncIOScheduler from apscheduler. fetch_and_sync_latest_updates() every 60 minutes.
Cloudinary upload stub. upload_image_to_cloudinary() is a no-op warning logger. Retained for backward compat only. NOT executed by any live code path.

nodes.parser: lxml (migrated from html.parser in Release 8 P2)
nodes.threading: asyncio.to_thread() for BeautifulSoup DOM work (Release 8 P1)
nodes.description: CSS-selector HTML scraper for Madara/TS-Theme sites. Multi-selector fallback chains for titles (12), chapter containers (10), page images (7+2 fallbacks). NSFW_BLOCKLIST filter. Unicode print → uvicorn logger override.
nodes.unicode_fix: print() → uvicorn logger to prevent UnicodeEncodeError on ASCII stdout hosts

nodes.description: Django REST API scraper. Bypasses Next.js client-side skeleton rendering. Sequential pagination (slug→ID lookup → details → chapter pages). Client injection enabled (Release 8 P3).
nodes.note: REST database IDs in URL path bypassed — extract_chapter_number skips URL parse for meshmanga.com/appswat.com

nodes.description: Multi-source manga metadata registry. Single document per canonical slug. Sources sub-document keyed by domain (e.g. 'meshmanga_com', 'olympustaff_com').
Cached chapter page image URL arrays. Keyed by absolute chapter URL.
Alias→canonical slug mapping table. Auto-seeded from slug_mappings.json on startup. Used by fetch_source_details_with_fallback to resolve mismatched slugs across sources.

app.state.http_client — process-level httpx.AsyncClient. Limits: max_connections=50, max_keepalive_connections=20. Initialized in lifespan, closed on shutdown. Injected into all scraper paths. (Release 8 P3)

Parses chapter float from title+URL. Returns -1.0 on failure (changed from 0.0 in Release 2 to distinguish parse-failure from Chapter 0). For meshmanga.com/appswat.com URLs: skips URL-path parse entirely (prevents REST DB ID pollution). Falls back to Arabic title extraction.
nodes.invariant: Returns -1.0 on failure (never 0.0 for parse failures post Release 2)
nodes.hotfix: MeshManga REST ID bypass — prevents /chapters/1751659/ from poisoning chapter float

nodes.description: Single-pass two-phase chapter number reconstruction. Input: chapter list in descending order. Reversed internally to ascending. Phase 1 — Backward Pass (Prologue Extrapolation):   delta = V / (first_valid_idx + 1) if V - first_valid_idx*1.0 <= 0 else 1.0   chapter_i = V - (first_valid_idx - i) * delta Phase 2 — Forward Pass (Monotonic Enforcement):   if -1.0: assign last_valid_val + 1.0   if valid but not strictly > last_valid_val: max(parsed, last_valid + 0.01) Output: reversed back to descending. CALLED EXACTLY ONCE on unified merged list (Merge-Then-Infer, Release 4).
nodes.invariant: Called exactly once post-merge (NOT per source). Stable sort input.

nodes.description: Global helper. Lowercases, removes Arabic diacritics, strips common prefixes (الفصل, فصل, شابتر, chapter, ch, ep, episode), normalizes Arabic chars (أإآ→ا, ة→ه, ى→ي), strips non-alphanumeric. Guards: isinstance(text, str) returns '' for non-strings (Release 5 crash fix).
nodes.invariant: isinstance(text, str) guard — returns '' for non-string input

nodes.description: Consolidated deduplication-before-inference pipeline (Release 4). Fixes double-sorting/source-stacking bug from Release 3. Steps: 1. extract_chapter_number per chapter (both sources raw). 2. Key = 'num_<N>' if N!=-1.0 else 'text_<normalize_text(title)>'. 3. Primary fills merged_chapters; Secondary only fills if key absent. 4. Stable sort descending by extracted_number. 5. infer_chapter_numbers called ONCE on unified sequence.

Stale-While-Revalidate caching on /api/v1/manga/details. TTL = 7200s (2 hours). Case A (Age < TTL): serve fresh cache → cleanse_cached_chapters → return. Case B (Age >= TTL): serve stale cache → trigger heal_manga_details_background. Case C (no cache): synchronous live fetch + merge + cache.
nodes.math: Age = T_current - T_cached; Response = D if Age < 7200 else D+heal() else sync_fetch()

nodes.description: In-memory deduplication of cached chapter arrays before client delivery. Resolves N defensively: chapter_number first, extracted_number second, extract_chapter_number(title,url) third. Applied in Case A and Case B. Eliminates legacy duplicate entries in client viewport instantly.

Dynamic Primary/Secondary source assignment based on asyncio event loop latency. P = argmin(latency) from successful results. Gap-filling: if c_j.chapter_number > max_primary_ch → append (extension). if c_j.chapter_number not in M → patch (gap-fill). Final consolidated list → infer_chapter_numbers → return descending.
Atomic MongoDB upsert. Single update_one({'slug': slug}, {'$set': {...}, '$setOnInsert': {...}}, upsert=True). Replaces non-atomic find-then-branch pattern. (Release 7 D1)
Non-sticky DB connectivity flag. Re-tests if IS_DB_ONLINE is False AND 30s cooldown has elapsed since last check. Prevents transient startup blips from permanently disabling all persistence.
nodes.invariant: IS_DB_ONLINE=False is not permanent; re-checked after 30s cooldown

nodes.description: Tests slug candidate URLs sequentially when HTTP 404/exceptions occur. Candidates: base slug, slug + '-manga', slug + '-arabic'. Returns working URL for background healing to persist.

Distributed atomic revalidation lease mechanism using find_one_and_update. Prevents the Thundering Herd / Dogpile effect during SWR cache healing transitions by converting O(N) concurrent scrapes into a flat O(1) single execution loop.
nodes.invariant: Atomic server-side check-and-set via a single MongoDB roundtrip. Gated within DB online checks.

nodes.description: Chapter images returned 403 Forbidden — Referer check by CDN.
nodes.resolution: Dynamic imageRequest override extracts host and sets matching Referer header.

nodes.description: UnicodeEncodeError crash on Vercel/serverless hosts with ASCII stdout when scrapers printed Arabic manga titles.
nodes.resolution: All print() in madara_base.py routed through uvicorn logger.

nodes.description: MeshManga chapter URLs contain REST DB IDs (e.g. /chapters/1751659/). URL-based regex parsed these as chapter numbers (millions), corrupting chronological sorting and multi-source deduplication.
nodes.resolution: extract_chapter_number skips URL-path regex entirely for meshmanga.com/appswat.com. Falls back immediately to Arabic title extraction.

nodes.description: setUrlWithoutDomain() stripped domain from chapter URLs stored in SQLite. Relative paths resolved against wrong default siteUrl (meshmanga.com → olympustaff).
Catalog endpoint read all 289 cached items ignoring page param, causing infinite scroll freeze in Mihon.
nodes.resolution: Removed read-first cache lookup. Live REST pagination + BackgroundTasks ingestion.

nodes.description: IS_DB_ONLINE set to False on transient startup blip permanently disabled all persistence for the container's lifetime.
Non-atomic find-then-insert upsert_manga_entry allowed concurrent writers to create duplicate slug documents, fragmenting chapter history.
nodes.resolution: Atomic update_one($set/$setOnInsert, upsert=True) + unique index on slug.

nodes.description: Per-source infer_chapter_numbers (Release 3) generated independent float sequences for each source (1.0→97.0 for A, 1.0→95.01 for B). No deduplication → two separate stacked blocks in final chapter list.
nodes.resolution: Merge-Then-Infer pipeline: deduplicate raw first, infer once on unified list.

nodes.description: Corrupted chapter payloads (None items, non-dict entries, None field values) caused TypeError in normalize_text and sorted() → HTTP 500 crash.
nodes.resolution: isinstance(text, str) guard in normalize_text. Per-item try/except in merge loops. isinstance(ch, dict) check. Explicit float() cast with -1.0 fallback.

nodes.description: Vercel serverless bypassed ASGI lifespan events, leaving IS_DB_ONLINE=False permanently. Database never initialized for container.
nodes.resolution: Lazy init via check_db_online() on first request; caches result for lifespan.

nodes.description: Cloudinary credentials read as None — load_dotenv() called after Settings init.
nodes.resolution: Explicit load_dotenv() before Settings class instantiation in core/config.py.
nodes.status: RESOLVED (and moot — Cloudinary removed entirely in Phase 2)

nodes.description: BeautifulSoup html.parser runs synchronously on asyncio event loop, blocking all concurrent requests for parse duration.
nodes.resolution: asyncio.to_thread() for all BS4 DOM work + lxml parser backend.

nodes.description: gc.collect() on request path blocks event loop, adds pure latency.
Legacy cache entries only contained chapter_number (not extracted_number). extracted_number check failed → assigned -1.0 → bypass deduplication → duplicate chapters visible in client.
nodes.resolution: cleanse_cached_chapters with defensive fallback chain: chapter_number → extracted_number → extract_chapter_number(title,url).

nodes.description: Multiple concurrent stale cache requests concurrently enqueued background healing scraping tasks, causing scraper pipeline dogpiling.
nodes.resolution: Atomic server-side check-and-set via find_one_and_update lease acquisition filter.

nodes.description: Removed all Cloudinary upload logic. core/storage.py deprecated as stub. Raw target URLs stored directly in MongoDB. Zero-cost image hosting.
MeshManga REST API scraper. Team X masquerade. BackgroundTasks ingestion. Live pagination fix. Vercel circuit-breaker check_db_online().
Reactivated NeoMangaMasterExtension as 'Olympus Staff'. MeshManga-over-Olympus merge priority. asyncio.gather parallel fetch. 5.0s timeout ceiling. Domain-based page dispatch.
infer_chapter_numbers() — backward prologue extrapolation + forward monotonic pass. extract_chapter_number returns -1.0 (not 0.0) on failure.
Dynamic Primary/Secondary source by asyncio event loop latency. Smart gap-filling and extension appending.
Fixes source-stacking double-sort bug. normalize_text dedup keys. Single-pass infer_chapter_numbers on unified merged list.
isinstance guards, per-item try/except, explicit float() coercion, str() casts. Zero HTTP 500 crashes from corrupted payloads.
Stale-While-Revalidate 2-hour TTL. heal_manga_details_background(). get_slug_candidates(). fetch_source_details_with_fallback(). cleanse_cached_chapters() duplicate fix.

Atomic upsert (D1), unique indexes (D2), non-sticky DB check (D4), explicit pool config (D5). lxml + asyncio.to_thread parsing (P1/P2). Shared httpx.AsyncClient pool (P3). Precompiled regex (P6). gc.collect removed (P5).

Migrated from Vercel to Render.com. No backend code changes (cloud-agnostic). baseUrl updated in MeshMangaExtension.kt, NeoMangaMasterExtension.kt, NetworkPreferences.kt. New endpoint: https://neomanga-api-server.onrender.com/api/v1

CSS selector drift warnings & critical scrape failures (S1, S2) in madara_base.py. Django REST API schema contract validation (S4) in meshmanga.py. Safe exception shielding & recovery with stale cached details fallback in main.py.
CURRENT production deployment host. Persistent server (not serverless). No 5s cold-start timeout. APScheduler runs continuously.
LEGACY deployment host (superseded by Render.com in Release 9). Serverless — BackgroundTasks execution not guaranteed post-response. ASGI lifespan bypass known issue.
Database. neomanga_db. Collections: manga_catalog, chapter_pages, slug_mappings.
https://appswat.com/v2/api/v2/ — Django REST API underlying MeshManga Next.js app. Reverse-engineered to bypass client-side skeleton loading.
https://olympustaff.com — Madara/TS-Theme WordPress manga site. CSS-selector HTML scraping via madara_base.py.
Web framework
ASGI server
Async HTTP client
HTML parsing
Async MongoDB driver (AsyncIOMotorClient)
Environment variable loading
60-minute background sync scheduler
DEPRECATED — retained in requirements.txt but storage.py is a stub
High-speed C-extension HTML parser backend (added Release 8)

Solved chapter sorting/prologue inversions via Chronological Interpolation, resolved sequential scraper timeouts via high-speed parallel asyncio.gather page fetch, and implemented Premium Chapter fallback registry.

Aligned Arabic Home Dashboard and API contracts. Implemented 15s page 1 loading timeouts and 10s pages 2-3 lazy loading in GetUnifiedGlobalCatalogUseCase.kt. Hardened DashboardScreenModel.kt with a 10s timeout, non-blocking firstOrNull() flow extraction, and 5x3s cold-start retry budget. Corrected Recommendations AsyncImage bindings in DashboardScreen.kt.

edges.invariant: called exactly once on unified merged list
